step_rationale: One-carbon metabolism; betaine metabolite; incident CVD and MI risk via systemic metabolic axis.
mechanism: Dysregulated one-carbon metabolism and methylation homeostasis associates with myocardial-infarction and heart-failure risk.

references.title: Large-Scale Metabolomics and the Incidence of Cardiovascular Disease.
references.journal: Journal of the American Heart Association

references.title: Plasma dimethylglycine and risk of incident acute myocardial infarction in patients with stable angina pectoris.
Betaine and secondary events in an acute coronary syndrome cohort.
